layout_note: Standard (non-transposed) Schedule A grid continuation. Group header 'M&R Trust Partnership' with two sub-trust group rows, then 11 private-equity/fund holdings all owned SP with EIF (Excepted Investment Fund) checked. Block C income for most rows is written 'PTRN' in the Other Type of Income column (partnership income). Transaction column (Block E) is empty for all rows. Block B value columns and Block D amount columns are printed over heavy grey shading; the bold X's in Block D and the PTRN text are legible but the exact Block B value column is low-confidence. Block B columns A=None,B=$1-$1,000,C=$1,001-$15,000,D=$15,001-$50,000,E=$50,001-$100,000,F=$100,001-$250,000,G=$250,001-$500,000,H=$500,001-$1,000,000,I=$1,000,001-$5,000,000,J=$5,000,001-$25,000,000,K=$25,000,001-$50,000,000,L=Over $50,000,000,M=Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000. Block D columns I=None,II=$1-$200,III=$201-$1,000,IV=$1,001-$2,500,V=$2,501-$5,000,VI=$5,001-$15,000,VII=$15,001-$50,000,VIII=$50,001-$100,000,IX=$100,001-$1,000,000,X=$1,000,001-$5,000,000,XI=Over $5,000,000,XII=Spouse/DC Asset with income over $1,000,000.

uncertainties.note: Block B value columns are heavily shaded; exact value bucket is low-confidence for every asset row. REP II and REP III appear marked in the leftmost column (None).

uncertainties.read: DFJ Growth Fund 2006 value=Spouse/DC Asset over $1,000,000, amount=$100,001-$1,000,000
uncertainties.note: value X is at the far-right of Block B (could be column I/J/L rather than the M spouse catch-all); amount X is right of the other rows (could be col X/XI). Both low-confidence.
Resilience Fund IV, Strategic Value FNBA, Kayne Anderson ROD amount X sits ~2/3 across Block D; could be col VI or VIII
full-page render suggested a possible additional X in Block C (DIVIDENDS) for the MLP Fund row, but the high-res crop shows only PTRN
